action.reasoning: Observation: EMA + positional features improved best to 404.04 (val) from 428. The EMA model converged smoothly without overfitting. ~118s/epoch. Analysis: Big gain from EMA. Have 3.2h left, 23 iters. Should: (1) submit eval to validate the new checkpoint, (2) try to push further. Could train longer with EMA since EMA prevents overfitting. Decision: Submit eval first to confirm gain, plan further from there.
